entries.title: ADR-002 col-025: synthesize_from_session Returns current_goal Directly
NULL feature_cycle in sessions breaks downstream retrospective pipeline silently
context_cycle topic must be the canonical feature ID — free-form descriptions break retrospective attribution silently
ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
ADR-003 col-024: Structured Log Event on Primary-Path Fallback Activation
